description: CompositionFresh pink round neck top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and bold print on the frontFittingSlimWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoBrighten up your neon nights in this fluorescent pink top from adidas.
